case_title: MICHAEL ANTHONY MCCORD VS. AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MCCORD, MICHAEL ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCORD, MICHAEL ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(AGENT: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE)* SERVED NOV-08-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCORD, MICHAEL ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,085.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS $500.00 FOR PLAINTIFF'S INSURANCE DEDUCTIBLE, AND $3500.00 FOR GENERAL AND SPECIFIC DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR MCCORD, MICHAEL ANTHONY ASSIGNED TO ORANGE CAPITAL SOLUTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,845.14 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM, LLC
